value.body:
[![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End/pull/47?utm_source=github_walkthrough&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=change_stack)
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough This PR removes the mock data/handler layer (dashboard, meals, orders, users, enums, meal-images) and its re-exports, switches API base URL selection to environment variables (VITE_ENV), reworks Axios token-refresh to decode JWT expiry via dynamic auth-store import, removes persistence from the restaurant store, and adds Playwright configuration plus a kitchen integration E2E test. ### Changes **Mock removal and real API integration** |Layer / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Environment-based API URL configuration**
`.env`, `src/services/api.js`|`.env` replaces `VITE_API_BASE_URL`/`VITE_USE_MOCK` with `VITE_ENV` and per-environment URL variables; `api.js` adds `getBaseURL()` and configures Axios `baseURL` from it, removing mock adapter logic.| |**Remove mock imports and store persistence**
`src/pages/OrderFlow/Cart.jsx`, `src/pages/customization/Customization.jsx`, `src/store/restaurantStore.js`|Removes unused `mockMeals` import, replaces mock `customizeData` with a local empty array, and drops the `persist` wrapper from the restaurant store.| |**Auth token refresh with dynamic store import and JWT decode**
`src/services/api.js`, `src/tests/services/api.test.js`|Interceptors dynamically import the auth store; refresh success decodes the JWT `exp` claim to compute `expiresAt` (with fallback) before calling `setAccessToken`; a new test validates the decoded expiry.| |**Playwright config and kitchen integration E2E test**
`playwright.config.js`, `tests/kitchen-integration.spec.js`, `test-results/.last-run.json`|Adds Playwright configuration with a Chromium project, a full login-order-checkout-kitchen-board E2E test, and a recorded passed test run result.| |**Deleted mock data/handler modules**
`src/mocks/dashboardMock.js`, `src/mocks/handlers.js`, `src/mocks/enums.js`, `src/mocks/index.js`, `src/mocks/meals.js`, `src/mocks/orders.js`, `src/mocks/users.js`, `src/mocks/meal-images/index.js`|Removes all mock datasets, handler resolution logic, enum constants, and re-exports previously used to simulate backend responses.| **Estimated code review effort:** 4 (Complex) | ~55 minutes **Possibly related PRs** - [Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End#36](https://github.com/Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End/pull/36): Adds the same dashboard mock/handler infrastructure that this PR removes. - [Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End#41](https://github.com/Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End/pull/41): Extends the mock handler layer (kitchen ticket/chef mocks) that this PR deletes.
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 5
✅ Passed checks (5 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The title matches the main changes: mock data removal and frontend environment integration updates. | | Docstring Coverage | ✅ Passed | No functions found in the changed files to evaluate docstring coverage. Skipping docstring coverage check. | | Linked Issues check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. | | Out of Scope Changes check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. |
✨ Finishing Touches
📝 Generate docstrings - [ ] Create stacked PR - [ ] Commit on current branch
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `feature/fix-refresh-token`
--- Thanks for using [CodeRabbit](https://coderabbit.ai?utm_source=oss&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=Revive-Graduation-Project/Revive-Front-End&utm_content=47)! It's free for OSS, and your support helps us grow. If you like it, consider giving us a shout-out.
❤️ Share - [X](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=I%20just%20used%20%40coderabbitai%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20the%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A&url=https%3A//coderabbit.ai) - [Mastodon](https://mastodon.social/share?text=I%20just%20used%20%40coderabbitai%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20the%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fcoderabbit.ai) - [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/submit?title=Great%20tool%20for%20code%20review%20-%20CodeRabbit&text=I%20just%20used%20CodeRabbit%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A%20https%3A//coderabbit.ai) - [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcoderabbit.ai&mini=true&title=Great%20tool%20for%20code%20review%20-%20CodeRabbit&summary=I%20just%20used%20CodeRabbit%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20proprietary%20code)

performed_via_github_app.name: coderabbitai
performed_via_github_app.description:
# Transforming Code Reviews with AI

## Features

**Automated Reviews**: Continuous reviews of the pull requests including incremental commits. 

**Summarization**: Generates high-level summary and a technical walkthrough of the PR changes. 

**Line-by-line review**: Provides line-by-line suggestions committable with one click.

**Codebase verification**:  Verifies the impact on the overall codebase and identifies missing changes.

**Insights into your code**:  Ask any questions on your codebase within the pull request 

**Chat about your code** : Chat with the bot around your code. The more you chat, the smarter it gets.

**Issue Validation**:  Validates the PR against the linked issues and identifies other related issues
